content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
Risk‑On: low volatility (Vol: 19.7%) with full breadth (8/8 sectors positive), broad cyclical-led rally.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals and Heavy Industry are leading: HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND; EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +12.10% | 1M: +44.86%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Transportation and Banking are the relative laggards despite gains: TAVHL (1W: +1.97% | 1M: -9.19%) RECOVERY; THYAO (1W: +0.89% | 1M: +6.51%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS as a stock lagging in Energy: TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND, EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +29.33%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +14.42% | 1M: +28.06%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +12.10% | 1M: +44.86%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) BELOW TREND, FROTO (1W: -0.51% | 1M: +0.83%) CORRECTION, KONTR (1W: -0.19% | 1M: +33.55%) CORRECTION, OYAKC (1W: -0.17% | 1M: +0.60%) CORRECTION, THYAO (1W: +0.89% | 1M: +6.51%) ABOVE TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND, EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +29.33%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +14.42% | 1M: +28.06%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +8.20% | 1M: +62.25%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks trade as risk-on beneficiaries with broad participation: AKBNK (1W: +2.80% | 1M: +8.66%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +2.62% | 1M: +8.03%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +6.10% | 1M: +14.44%) ABOVE TREND; watch credit spreads and CBRT commentary for next leg.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry showing strong cyclical rebound: EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND, TOASO (1W: +8.74% | 1M: +27.08%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: -0.51% | 1M: +0.83%) CORRECTION, ASELS (1W: +1.96% | 1M: +25.29%) ABOVE TREND.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Momentum but mixed internals: HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +12.10% | 1M: +44.86%) ABOVE TREND, SISE (1W: +8.23% | 1M: +18.26%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) BELOW TREND — watch oil and margin signals.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Overweight cyclicals and select consumer names; trim isolated laggards (TUPRS, pockets of Transportation) and take profits on extreme short‑term rockets; maintain liquidity cushion for rotation risk in a low‑volatility bull.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND, EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +8.20% | 1M: +62.25%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) BELOW TREND, CCOLA (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +29.33%) ABOVE TREND.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Energy & Chemicals and Heavy Industry for continuation; Retail & Food for domestic demand signal and earnings flow.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to its recent highs and 20‑day MA for breakout/fade; catalysts: Turkish CPI and CBRT comments, oil prices, global risk appetite, corporate earnings and FX moves.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low volatility, full-sector breadth: a classic risk‑on tape led by Energy & Heavy Industry with standout momentum names HEKTS, EREGL and SASA. Opportunity to add cyclicals and consumer exposure, but manage positions in stretched winners and underweight isolated laggards such as TUPRS and selective Transportation names.
